creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
This port updates Inconsolata monospaced font to the latest version.

Please add the following message to UPDATING file:

---->8---->8----
To upgrade the existing port, you've to delete existing distfiles of this port, before upgrading:

# make -C /usr/ports/x11-fonts/inconsolata-ttf distclean
----8<----8<----
